fields.Description: Email from {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.email.sender_email }} requires human intervention. Subject: {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.email.subject }}. Urgency: {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.urgency }}. Confidence: {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.confidence }}

parameters.jsCode:
// BMAD Response Generation - MEASURE Phase
const emailData = $input.first().json;
const persona = emailData.persona;
const email = emailData.email;

// Persona-specific response templates
const responseTemplates = {
  mary: {
    subject: 'Re: ' + email.subject,
    greeting: 'Hi there! 👋',
    intro: 'I'm Mary, your Customer Success Manager at Rensto. I've received your message and I'm here to help!',
    body: 'I'm currently reviewing your request and will get back to you with a detailed response within 2 hours during business hours.',
    resources: 'In the meantime, you can:
• Check our knowledge base: https://help.rensto.com
• Schedule a call: https://calendly.com/rensto/mary
• Contact urgent support: support@rensto.com',
    signature: 'Best regards,
Mary Johnson
Customer Success Manager
Rensto Business Solutions

📧 mary@rensto.com
🌐 https://rensto.com
📱 +1 (555) 123-4567

"Empowering businesses with intelligent automation solutions"'
  },
  john: {
    subject: 'Re: ' + email.subject,
    greeting: 'Hello! 🔧',
    intro: 'I'm John, Technical Support Engineer at Rensto. I've received your technical inquiry and will investigate this issue promptly.',
    body: 'I'll analyze your request and provide a comprehensive technical solution within 1 hour during business hours.',
    resources: 'For immediate assistance:
• Check our technical docs: https://docs.rensto.com
• View system status: https://status.rensto.com
• Emergency support: support@rensto.com',
    signature: 'Best regards,
John Smith
Technical Support Engineer
Rensto Business Solutions

📧 john@rensto.com
🌐 https://rensto.com
📱 +1 (555) 123-4567

"Empowering businesses with intelligent automation solutions"'
  },
  winston: {
    subject: 'Re: ' + email.subject,
    greeting: 'Greetings! 🚀',
    intro: 'I'm Winston, Business Development Manager at Rensto. Thank you for your interest in our solutions!',
    body: 'I'll review your inquiry and get back to you within 24 hours with personalized recommendations and next steps.',
    resources: 'In the meantime:
• Explore our solutions: https://rensto.com/solutions
• View case studies: https://rensto.com/case-studies
• Schedule a demo: https://calendly.com/rensto/winston',
    signature: 'Best regards,
Winston Chen
Business Development Manager
Rensto Business Solutions

📧 winston@rensto.com
🌐 https://rensto.com
📱 +1 (555) 123-4567

"Empowering businesses with intelligent automation solutions"'
  },
  sarah: {
    subject: 'Re: ' + email.subject,
    greeting: 'Hi there! 📢',
    intro: 'I'm Sarah, Marketing Specialist at Rensto. Thanks for reaching out about our marketing initiatives!',
    body: 'I'll review your message and respond within 24 hours with relevant information and resources.',
    resources: 'Stay connected:
• Follow us on LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/rensto
• Subscribe to our newsletter: https://rensto.com/newsletter
• Check our blog: https://rensto.com/blog',
    signature: 'Best regards,
Sarah Rodriguez
Marketing Specialist
Rensto Business Solutions

📧 sarah@rensto.com
🌐 https://rensto.com
📱 +1 (555) 123-4567

"Empowering businesses with intelligent automation solutions"'
  },
  alex: {
    subject: 'Re: ' + email.subject,
    greeting: 'Hello! ⚙️',
    intro: 'I'm Alex, Operations Manager at Rensto. I've received your operational inquiry and will address it promptly.',
    body: 'I'll review your request and provide operational guidance within 4 hours during business hours.',
    resources: 'For process-related questions:
• View our processes: https://rensto.com/processes
• Check workflow status: https://status.rensto.com
• Contact support: support@rensto.com',
    signature: 'Best regards,
Alex Thompson
Operations Manager
Rensto Business Solutions

📧 alex@rensto.com
🌐 https://rensto.com
📱 +1 (555) 123-4567

"Empowering businesses with intelligent automation solutions"'
  },
  quinn: {
    subject: 'Re: ' + email.subject,
    greeting: 'Greetings! 📊',
    intro: 'I'm Quinn, Finance & Analytics Manager at Rensto. I've received your financial inquiry and will review it carefully.',
    body: 'I'll analyze your request and provide detailed financial information within 24 hours.',
    resources: 'For financial information:
• View pricing: https://rensto.com/pricing
• Check billing portal: https://billing.rensto.com
• Contact billing: billing@rensto.com',
    signature: 'Best regards,
Quinn Williams
Finance & Analytics Manager
Rensto Business Solutions

📧 quinn@rensto.com
🌐 https://rensto.com
📱 +1 (555) 123-4567

"Empowering businesses with intelligent automation solutions"'
  }
};

const template = responseTemplates[persona];

// Generate personalized response
const response = {
  to: email.sender_email,
  from: persona + '@rensto.com',
  subject: template.subject,
  body: `${template.greeting}

${template.intro}

${template.body}

${template.resources}

${template.signature}`,
  persona: persona,
  original_email: email,
  response_type: 'auto_reply',
  generated_at: new Date().toISOString()
};

return [
  {
    json: response
  }
];

fields.Name: ={{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.email.sender_name }}
fields.Notes: Customer created from email interaction. Last contact: {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.email.received_at }}. Persona: {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.persona }}

fields.Task Name: Follow up on email from {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.email.sender_name }}
fields.Description: Follow up on email interaction. Subject: {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.email.subject }}. Persona: {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.persona }}. Response sent: {{ $json.body }}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "message": "Email processed successfully",
  "persona": "{{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.persona }}",
  "confidence": {{ $('BMAD Email Processing').item.json.confidence }},
  "response_sent": true,
  "customer_created": true,
  "followup_scheduled": true
}
